import * as React from "react"; import { isModuleNotFoundError } from "@tanstack/router-core"; import { reactUse } from "./utils.js"; function lazyRouteComponent(importer, exportName) { let loadPromise; let comp; let error; let reload; const load = () => { if (!loadPromise) { loadPromise = importer().then((res) => { loadPromise = void 0; comp = res[exportName ?? "default"]; }).catch((err) => { error = err; if (isModuleNotFoundError(error)) { if (error instanceof Error && typeof window !== "undefined" && typeof sessionStorage !== "undefined") { const storageKey = `tanstack_router_reload:${error.message}`; if (!sessionStorage.getItem(storageKey)) { sessionStorage.setItem(storageKey, "1"); reload = true; } } } }); } return loadPromise; }; const lazyComp = function Lazy(props) { if (reload) { window.location.reload(); throw new Promise(() => { }); } if (error) { throw error; } if (!comp) { if (reactUse) { reactUse(load()); } else { throw load(); } } return React.createElement(comp, props); }; lazyComp.preload = load; return lazyComp; } export { lazyRouteComponent }; //# sourceMappingURL=lazyRouteComponent.js.map
